subcodes.first_line: O 'Azizu'llah! Verily I say, through the effulgences of the Luminary of Divine Utterance, the Desired One of all worlds, the universe hath been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیزالله براستی میگویم از تجلیات نیر بیان مقصود عالمیان عالم منور گشته و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
